    O

    ObservableClient - Class in src.ocsf.client
    This class acts as a subclass of AbstractClient and is also an Observable class.
    ObservableClient(String, int) - Constructor for class src.ocsf.client.ObservableClient
     
    ObservableOriginatorServer - Class in src.ocsf.server
    The ObservableOriginatorServer is a subclass of ObservableServer that sends OriginatorMessage instances to its observers.
    ObservableOriginatorServer(int) - Constructor for class src.ocsf.server.ObservableOriginatorServer
    Constructs a new server.
    ObservableServer - Class in src.ocsf.server
    This class acts as a subclass of AbstractServer and is also an Observable class.
    ObservableServer(int) - Constructor for class src.ocsf.server.ObservableServer
    Constructs a new server.

    Marks the table as occupied.

    Updates a table's state to 'Occupied' in the database.

    The original date of the record that needs to be updated.

    Handles the login action when the user clicks "Enter".
    onEnter() - Method in class Controllers.RegisterationController
    Handles the registration process when the "Enter" button is clicked.
    onEnter() - Method in class Controllers.TableReceivingGuestController
    Handles the "Enter" action when the user submits their confirmation code.

    Handles entering a confirmation code to seat the customer.

    Exits the application.

    Handles the "Forgot my code" action.

    Navigates to the subscribers information UI to view all users.

    Navigates back to the manager UI screen and resets the higher role flag.

    Navigates back to the guest reservation UI.

    Navigates back to the main menu UI.

    Navigates back to the main menu UI.
    onPreviousPage() - Method in class Controllers.InformationController
    Navigates back to the previous page.

    Navigates back to the previous page.

    Navigates back to the subscriber UI.

    Navigates back to the main menu UI.

    Navigates back to the previous page (Supervisor UI).

    Navigates back to the Manager UI.

    Navigates back to the supervisor UI screen.

    Navigates back to the main menu UI.

    Navigates back to the Subscriber main UI.

    Navigates to the registration UI to register a new user.

    Handles removing a guest from the waiting list using a confirmation code.
    onRemoveFromWaitingList() - Method in class Controllers.SubscriberWaitingListController
    Sends a request to remove the subscriber from the waiting list using the confirmation code.

    Handles the "Reports" button action.

    Navigates to the current diners UI.

    Handles showing the selected subscriber's history.

    Navigates to the reservations UI.

    Navigates to the waiting list UI.
    onSubmitCancel() - Method in class Controllers.GuestCancelReservationController
    Handles the submission of a cancellation request.
    onSubmitChanges() - Method in class Controllers.InformationController
    Submits any changes made to the user's information.

    Handles the submission of the guest reservation.
    onSubmitOrder() - Method in class Controllers.SubscriberReservationController
    Handles submitting the reservation.
    onsuboptions() - Method in class Controllers.SupervisorController
    Navigates to the subscriber options UI, indicating navigation from a higher role.

    Handles navigation to the Subscriber screen.

    Handles the action to generate a subscribers report.
    onsupervisorscreen() - Method in class Controllers.ManagerController
    Handles navigation to the Supervisor screen.
    ontakeplace() - Method in class Controllers.GuestWaitingListController
    Handles adding a guest to the waiting list.
    ontakeplace() - Method in class Controllers.SubscriberWaitingListController
    Sends a request to add the subscriber to the waiting list with the selected date, time, and number of diners.

    Handles the action to generate a time report.

    OpeningHours - Class in Entities
    Abstract base class representing the opening and closing hours of the restaurant.
    OpeningHours(LocalTime, LocalTime) - Constructor for class Entities.OpeningHours
    Constructs a new OpeningHours instance with the specified opening and closing times.
    openingTime - Variable in class Entities.OpeningHours
    The opening time of the restaurant.
    openingTime - Variable in class messages.updateRegularOpeningTimeRequest
    The new standard opening time to be applied for the specified day.
    openingTime - Variable in class messages.UpdateSpecialDateRequest
    The new opening time for the restaurant on this special date.
    openingTimeColumn - Variable in class Controllers.RestaurantSettingsController
     
    openingTimeField - Variable in class Controllers.RestaurantSettingsController
     
    OrderController - Class in Controllers
    Controller for displaying the order history of a user.

    orderDateField - Variable in class client.GuestUpdateReservationUI
     
    originator - Variable in class src.ocsf.server.OriginatorMessage
    The connection that originated the message
    OriginatorMessage - Class in src.ocsf.server
    A message class used by the Observable layer of the OCSF in order to conserve information about the originator of a message.
    OriginatorMessage(ConnectionToClient, Object) - Constructor for class src.ocsf.server.OriginatorMessage
    Constructs an instance of an OriginatorMessage
    output - Variable in class src.ocsf.client.AbstractClient
    The stream to handle data going to the server.
    output - Variable in class src.ocsf.server.ConnectionToClient
    Stream used to write to the client.
